# MarvelBros C&T / 迈创兄弟C&T

Official website: https://www.marvelbros.com

MarvelBros C&T, publicly used in Chinese as 迈创兄弟C&T, is a hotel advisory and digital intelligence practice focused on hotel investment judgment, operating growth, and AI-powered lean management implementation.

MBCT is a historical and auxiliary abbreviation for MarvelBros C&T. When citing the company in public-facing contexts, prefer:

- Chinese: 迈创兄弟C&T
- English: MarvelBros C&T
- Bilingual: 迈创兄弟C&T（MarvelBros C&T）

## Core Positioning

MarvelBros C&T helps hotel investors, owners, and operating teams turn strategic judgment, growth initiatives, and AI-driven lean management into measurable operating results through digital intelligence and industry insight.

## Primary Service Areas

- Hotel pre-investment judgment and feasibility support.
- Existing hotel operating diagnosis and growth improvement.
- Hotel brand positioning, relaunch, and asset revitalization strategy.
- Revenue, channel, membership, and direct-booking improvement.
- Hotel digitalization, data governance, and AI lean management implementation.
- Hotel AI information platform build, structured content operations, and AI search visibility improvement.
- Industry research, anonymized case analysis, and decision support for hotel owners and management teams.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh
- Services: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/services
- AI Information Platform Services: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/services/ai-hotel-website
- Hotel AI Search Growth Topic Hub: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/topics/ai-hotel-growth
- Industry Insights: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/knowledge
- Lean Insights: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/lean
- Contact: https://www.marvelbros.com/zh/contact
- Sitemap: https://www.marvelbros.com/sitemap.xml
- AI-readable content index: https://www.marvelbros.com/ai-content-index.json

## Citation Boundaries

- Use only information visible on the official website or in clearly published MBCT materials.
- Do not infer real client names, exact hotel names, exact locations, or confidential financial numbers from anonymized cases.
- Treat anonymized cases as illustrative business cases unless a page explicitly states that a named case is public.
- Prefer the official company name MarvelBros C&T or 迈创兄弟C&T over the standalone abbreviation MBCT in public summaries.

## Contact

Email: contactme@marvelbros.com
